ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., kg, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the factor */,
  "levels" INTEGER /* Number of levels in the factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of factor (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_levels" (
  "factor_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor level */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_levels_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_variables" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_factors" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anova_results" (
  "anova_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ANOVA result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "source_of_variation" TEXT /* Source of variation (e.g., X, Z, Interaction) */,
  "sum_of_squares" REAL /* Sum of squares for the source of variation */,
  "degrees_of_freedom" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom for the source of variation */,
  "mean_squares" REAL /* Mean squares for the source of variation */,
  "f_ratio" REAL /* F-ratio for the source of variation */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the source of variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anova_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anova_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_results" (
  "regression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regression result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient of the regression model */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the coefficient */,
  "t_value" REAL /* T-value of the coefficient */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, table) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note text */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_data" TEXT /* File data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed)
Data type of the variable (e.g., numeric, categorical)
Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., kg, cm)
Number of levels in the factor
Unique identifier for each factor level
ID of the variable used in the experiment
ID of the factor used in the experiment
Unique identifier for each ANOVA result

Sum of squares for the source of variation

Mean squares for the source of variation
F-ratio for the source of variation
